provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
This Order may be cited as the Voters (General Registration Period) Order, 2003.

provisions.title: Appointment of general registration period
provisions.content:
2. Appointment of general registration period
The period between 1st November, 2003 and 30th November, 2003 is hereby appointed to be a general registration period in respect of all the 57 constituencies specified in the Schedule hereto.
